items.question: What services does Webxpert offer?
items.answer: Webxpert provides comprehensive AI-driven software development, including custom web and mobile applications, digital transformation, cloud infrastructure, and enterprise AI integrations.

items.question: How long does a typical software development project last?
items.answer: With our AI-augmented processes, we deliver up to 10X faster. A typical MVP or initial release can be completed in 4-8 weeks, while comprehensive enterprise systems might span 3-6 months.

items.question: What technologies do you specialize in?
items.answer: We specialize in modern stacks like React, Next.js, Node, Python, and scalable cloud networks (AWS/GCP). Additionally, our deep expertise in LLMs, machine learning, and AI tooling ensures your product is future-proof.

items.question: How do you ensure security and IP protection?
items.answer: We follow strict security protocols, including GDPR and ISO 27001 compliance. All data is encrypted, and your intellectual property is 100% protected through rigorous NDA frameworks.
